/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/geocoordinates.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgeocoordinates.so -o libgeocoordinates.so CMakeFiles/geocoordinates.dir/geocoordinates_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/geocoordinates.dir/geocoordinates.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
